title: Studio Ghibli Returns With a Special New Anime in July
content: Even decades after its establishment in 1985, Studio Ghibli has remained the most iconic animation studio when it comes to anime movies. Every film produced by the studio is famous for its striking visuals, rich storytelling, and deep emotional impact.
author: ComicBook

title: Towa Ōshima's Kimi ga Loafer o Haitara Enters Climax in 5th Volume
content: The fourth compiled book volume of Towa Ōshima's Kimi ga Loafer o Haitara ( When you put on loafers ) manga revealed on April 16 that the manga will enter its climax with the manga's fifth volume.
author: ANN

title: Dragon Ball Super Confirms Frieza Remake With First Look
content: Dragon Ball kicked off 2026 with several exciting announcements during the Genki Dama Matsuri, an event held to commemorate the manga’s 40th anniversary. The anime will return this year with a remake film as part of the Fall 2026 season lineup and will retell the story of Dragon Ball Z: Battle of Gods .
author: ComicBook

title: Banjō Saitō's Genkai! Oshikatsu Densetsu Yoshio Manga Ends With 8th Volume
content: The seventh compiled book volume of Banjō Saitō 's Genkai! Oshikatsu Densetsu Yoshio manga revealed on April 10 that the manga will end in the manga's eighth volume in September.
author: ANN

title: Yona of the Dawn Manga Exceeds 16 Million Copies Worldwide
content: Viz Media licensed the manga, and describes the first volume: A red-haired princess loses her family and her kingdom… Now she must rise and fight for her throne! Princess Yona lives an ideal life as the only princess of her kingdom.
author: ANN

title: Actor Rif Hutton Dies At 73
content: Hutton voiced several roles in films such as Astro Boy, The Wind Rises , Kingsglaive: Final Fantasy XV , and Sonic the Hedgehog . Other animated roles include Osmosis Jones, Mr. Peabody & Sherman , and The Twits .
author: ANN

title: Marriage Toxin Anime Reveals English Dub Cast
content: Crunchyroll began streaming the English dub of the television anime for Jōmyaku and artist Mizuki Yoda 's Marriage Toxin manga on Tuesday. The English dub cast includes: • Ethan Gallardo as Hikaru • Brittney Karbowski as Mei • Taylor Murphy as Akari • Marcus Stimac as Bug Master • Parker Gray as Tomohisa • Cody Savoie…
author: ANN

title: Abrams ComicArts' Kana Licenses Satoshi Morie's 'My Dear, A Mystery For You' Manga
content: Abrams ComicArts ' Kana imprint announced on Monday that it has licensed Satoshi Morie 's My Dear, A Mystery For You ( Shinai naru A-jō e no Mystery ) manga, and will release the first volume in May 2027.
author: ANN

title: My Hero Academia Concert World Tour Announces U.S. Tour Dates
content: TOHO , GEA Live, and RoadCo Entertainment announced on Tuesday the U.S. tour dates for the " My Hero Academia in Concert" world tour , featuring composer Yūki Hayashi and scenes from the anime. The U.S. leg of the tour begins on September 12 and ends on October 25. The full list of U.S.
author: ANN

title: Netflix Streams Akane-banashi Anime With English Dub/Sub on May 17
content: The anime began airing on TV Asahi 's "IMAnimation" programming block on April 4. The anime also has its own " Akane-banashi Global" YouTube channel , where full episodes stream for free in North America and Latin America, after their television broadcast in Japan.
author: ANN
